description_long: This is a compact, wooden shelving unit featuring three horizontal shelves supported by two vertical side panels. The left section of the unit includes a rack with a wavy cutout, likely designed for holding bottles or cylindrical objects securely. The right section consists of three open shelves, ideal for storing or displaying various items. The overall design is simple and functional, with a natural wood finish and no visible doors or handles. The structure appears sturdy and is suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings. The open design allows for easy access to stored items and visibility from multiple angles.
description: A small, wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a wavy rack section for bottles or similar items. It has a natural wood finish and a practical, open design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the wavy rack section and the three open shelves side by side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and the wavy cutouts of the rack section.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, showing the open shelves and rack but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the vertical side panel and the depth of the shelves and rack.
